question: उन ड्राइवरों के लिए ड्राइविंग अनुभव स्तरों और दुर्घटना आईडी की कुल संख्या की सूची बनाएं जिनके पास '1-2yr' का ड्राइविंग अनुभव है या शैक्षणिक स्तर 'जूनियर हाई स्कूल' है, परिणामों को ड्राइविंग अनुभव के आधार पर समूहित करें और केवल उन समूहों को शामिल करें जिनके पास 1 से अधिक दुर्घटनाएं हैं।

SELECT d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE, COUNT(f.ACCIDENT_ID) AS TOTAL_ACCIDENTS
FROM DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
WHERE d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE = '1-2yr' OR d.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL = 'Junior high school'
GROUP BY d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE
HAVING COUNT(f.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1;
raw_output:

JOIN DIM_ENVIRONMENT DE ON FA.ENVIRONMENT_ID = DE.ENVIRONMENT_ID
JOIN DIM_ACCIDENT_EVENT DAE ON FA.ACCIDENT_EVENT_ID = DAE.ACCIDENT_EVENT_ID
WHERE DE.LIGHT_CONDITIONS ILIKE 'Darkness - no lighting'
AND DAE.TYPE_OF_COLLISION ILIKE 'Vehicle with vehicle collision'
AND FA.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES > 5
ORDER BY FA.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES DESC;

AND FA.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES > 5
ORDER BY FA.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES DESC;

gold_sql: SELECT T1.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL, T1.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE, AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) FROM DIM_DRIVER AS T1 JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT AS T2 ON T1.DRIVER_ID = T2.DRIVER_ID JOIN BRIDGE_ACCIDENT_CASUALTY AS T3 ON T2.ACCIDENT_ID = T3.ACCIDENT_ID WHERE T1.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER IN ('31-50', '18-30') AND T1.SEX_OF_DRIVER = 'Male' GROUP BY T1.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL, T1.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE HAVING COUNT(T2.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1 ORDER BY AVG(T2.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) DESC;
predicted_sql:
SELECT 
    d.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL,
    d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE,
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties_per_accident
FROM DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
WHERE d.SEX_OF_DRIVER ILIKE 'Male'
  AND (d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER ILIKE '31-50' OR d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER ILIKE '18-30')
GROUP BY d.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL, d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE
HAVING COUNT(f.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1
ORDER BY avg_casualties_per_accident DESC;
raw_output:
SELECT 
    d.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL,
    d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE,
    AVG(f.NUMBER_OF_CASUALTIES) AS avg_casualties_per_accident
FROM DIM_DRIVER d
JOIN FACT_ACCIDENT f ON d.DRIVER_ID = f.DRIVER_ID
WHERE d.SEX_OF_DRIVER ILIKE 'Male'
  AND (d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER ILIKE '31-50' OR d.AGE_BAND_OF_DRIVER ILIKE '18-30')
GROUP BY d.EDUCATIONAL_LEVEL, d.DRIVING_EXPERIENCE
HAVING COUNT(f.ACCIDENT_ID) > 1
